---
name: Spike / Investigation
about: Bounded investigation with a stated question and explicit success/failure criteria. Output is a report, not a PR.
labels: [spike, spec-needed]
---

## Question

<!-- The single bounded question this spike must answer. Be specific. -->

## Context

<!-- Why does this question matter? What decision does the answer inform? -->

## Success Criteria

<!-- What does a successful spike look like? What would we learn or confirm? -->

-

## Failure Criteria

<!-- What does an inconclusive or failed spike look like? What do we do next if it fails? -->

-

## Scope

<!-- What is in scope for this investigation? -->

## Out of Scope

<!-- What should not be explored? Keeps the spike bounded. -->

## Expected Output

<!-- What should the spike report contain? e.g. benchmark results, prototype code, recommendation, tradeoff analysis -->

-

## Time Box

<!-- Maximum effort before the spike must conclude with a report, even if inconclusive. -->

-

## Decision After Spike

<!-- What happens next based on outcome? Name the likely follow-up issue types. -->

- If successful:
- If inconclusive:
- If failed:
